versioning_policy.major: breaking schema, answer-key, scoring, import, handoff, permission or API change
versioning_policy.minor: new backward-compatible parser, exception type, score formula, report or workflow extension
versioning_policy.patch: bug fix, validation update, copy/config correction
versioning_policy.score_batch_versioning: Every recalculation creates a new score batch/snapshot version.

_meta.generator_note: Semantic compiled module spec; not a CSV-row wrapper.
